verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable answer immediately: "This swallows every failure silently — that's the core problem"; A also flags it but adds framing before fixes.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to the decision path: "If yes, handle the specific expected error and log it. If no, don't catch it at all"; A surveys several "Better options".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives the immediate decision rule and minimal corrected shape without extra triage suggestions.
